steps.title: Calculate accounts registered in the first 5 days
steps.content:
At 1,200 accounts per day, the number registered over 5 days is:
$$1,200 \times 5 = 6,000$$

steps.title: Find the fraction of the first 60,000 accounts
steps.content:
The fraction of the first 60,000 accounts registered in the first 5 days is:
$$\frac{6,000}{60,000} = \frac{6}{60} = \frac{1}{10}$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
